response.original_title: How do I contact Uphold customer service: Account || Retrieval
response.overview: 1.	Use “Forgot Password” Go to the Uphold login page and click【☏ 1-830-745-0056】 “Forgot Password”. Enter your registered email address to receive a password reset link. Follow the link to create a new password.【☏ 1-830-745-0056】 2.	Check Your Email Inbox Look for emails from Uphold in both your 【☏ 1-830-745-0056】 inbox and spam/junk folder. Recovery and verification links are 【☏ 1-830-745-0056】 always sent to your registered email.
